summary: Comprehensive testing of Supplier Profile Pages feature. Backend: 8/8 tests passed (GET /api/suppliers/{slug}/profile, GET /api/suppliers/directory, 404 handling). Frontend: 18/18 tests passed (profile page rendering, H1, breadcrumbs, hero section, GST badge, metrics row, 5 tabs, tab switching, Overview/Catalog/Inventory/Orders content, sidebar Quick Stats/Send Enquiry/Similar Suppliers, RFQ modal).
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/suppliers/pali-mills/profile returns seller with company_name 'Pali Mills'
Backend: GET /api/suppliers/test-fabrics-co/profile returns seller with fabrics array (1 fabric)
Backend: GET /api/suppliers/directory returns array of 6 active suppliers
Backend: GET /api/suppliers/nonexistent/profile returns 404
Backend: Supplier profile has review_stats with sub_ratings
Backend: Supplier profile has similar_suppliers array
Backend: Supplier profile seller object has all required fields
Backend: Supplier profile stats object has all required fields
Frontend: /suppliers/fabrics/pali/pali-mills renders supplier profile page
Frontend: H1 contains 'Pali Mills — Cotton Manufacturer in Jawahar Nagar'
Frontend: Breadcrumb navigation visible with Home > fabrics Suppliers > pali > Pali Mills
Frontend: Hero section visible with logo, badges, CTAs
Frontend: GST Verified badge shows for test-fabrics-co (has GST)
Frontend: Metrics row shows 4 stat cards (Total Orders, On-Time Delivery, Active SKUs, Years in Business)
Frontend: Tab navigation has 5 tabs (Overview, Catalog, Inventory, Reviews, Orders & Terms)
Frontend: Tab switching works correctly - active indicator changes
Frontend: Overview tab shows Business Details table and Primary Contact card
Frontend: Contact card shows masked phone (94608 2****) and email (inf***@palimills.com)
Frontend: Catalog tab shows filter bar with category select and In Stock toggle
Frontend: Inventory tab shows 3 metric cards (Total SKUs, In Stock, Low Stock)
Frontend: Orders tab shows Order Terms and Shipping & Delivery tables
Frontend: Sidebar shows Quick Stats section
Frontend: Sidebar shows Send Enquiry button
Frontend: Sidebar shows Similar Suppliers section
Frontend: 'Contact Supplier' button opens RFQ modal
Frontend: Sidebar 'Send Enquiry' button opens RFQ modal
critical_code_review_comments: supplier_profile_router.py: Well-structured API with proper slug matching, stats aggregation, and similar suppliers logic
SupplierProfilePage.js: Comprehensive tabbed layout with SEO-friendly CSS visibility toggle (not display:none) for crawlability
All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing
Masked contact info (phone/email) correctly implemented for privacy
JSON-LD structured data for breadcrumbs and organization schema properly implemented
seed_data_creation: None - used existing sellers (Pali Mills, Test Fabrics Co.)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Supplier Profile Pages feature fully tested and working. Backend API at /api/suppliers/{slug}/profile returns comprehensive profile data including seller details, fabrics, stats, reviews, orders, and similar suppliers. Frontend renders all data in tabbed layout with SEO meta tags and JSON-LD structured data. Test URLs: /suppliers/fabrics/pali/pali-mills (0 fabrics), /suppliers/fabrics/gurgaon/test-fabrics-co (1 fabric, GST verified). RFQ modal opens from both 'Contact Supplier' button and sidebar 'Send Enquiry' button.

api_endpoints_tested.GET /api/suppliers/test-fabrics-co/profi: 200 OK - Returns Test Fabrics Co. profile with 1 fabric
